Our Work
See results

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything You
Want to Know

How much does it cost?

Every project is priced on scope — but most websites start from KES 80,000 and automation systems from KES 150,000. We give you a clear quote after your free assessment, with no hidden fees.

How long does it take?

Most projects go live within 6–12 weeks. Simpler websites can be done in 4 weeks. We always agree a timeline upfront and we hit it.

Do you work with small businesses?

Yes. Some of our best work has been with businesses under KES 500K/month who needed a strong digital foundation. Size is less important than commitment to growth.

What happens after launch?

We offer an ongoing Maintenance Phase — monthly monitoring, updates, and improvements. But if you just want the build, that's fine too. We hand everything over fully so you're never dependent on us.

Can you integrate M-Pesa with my existing website?

Yes. We can integrate Daraja STK Push, C2B, and B2C into any modern website. We handle the full setup including the Safaricom approval process if you don't have a shortcode yet.

Do you work with clients outside Mombasa?

Absolutely. We work with businesses across Kenya — Nairobi, Kisumu, Nakuru, wherever you are. All discovery meetings can be done online.

What do I need to get started?

Nothing except a few minutes to answer our assessment questions. We'll take it from there and come back to you with a clear picture of what we'd recommend.

Do you offer payment plans?

Yes. For larger projects we offer a 50% upfront / 50% on launch split. Monthly billing is available for ongoing services.
